intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the hotel booking action after the travel budget is updated.
success_criteria: Use the latest approved budget limit.
hard_constraints: Use the latest approved budget, not superseded guidance.
soft_preferences: Prefer the lowest cost option that stays within the approved limit.
forbidden_actions: Apply stale budget guidance after an approved exception.
stop_conditions: Stop after choosing the hotel action.

corpus.title: Initial budget note
corpus.text: Travel budget cap is 150 dollars per night.

corpus.title: Approved exception
corpus.text: Conference week exception approved up to 220 dollars per night.

events.text: The initial budget note says 150 dollars per night.
A later approval note raises the cap to 220 dollars for conference week.

payload.summary: Approved exception raises the cap to 220 dollars.

events.text: Choose the hotel booking action for the 210 dollar option.

required_constraints: Use the latest approved budget, not superseded guidance.

options.label: Approve the 210 dollar hotel under the exception.

plan_steps: Book the hotel under the approved exception.

options.label: Reject the hotel because it exceeds the old 150 dollar cap.
violates_constraints: Use the latest approved budget, not superseded guidance.

risk_flags: Used stale budget guidance after an approved exception.

required_constraints: Use the latest approved budget, not superseded guidance.
required_decisions: Approve the 210 dollar hotel under the exception.
